hero.title: Unlock your full potential
hero.subtitle: Excel, Notion and PDF templates designed to help you manage your budget, boost productivity and reach your goals.

product_page.faq_q1: How do I receive my file?
product_page.faq_a1: As soon as your payment is confirmed, you receive an email with the download link. The file is also available in your account area.
product_page.faq_q2: How many times can I download?
product_page.faq_a2: You can download your purchase up to 5 times, valid for 30 days.
product_page.faq_q3: Which version is it compatible with?
product_page.faq_a3: Excel templates are compatible with Microsoft Excel 2016+ and Google Sheets. Notion templates require a Notion account (free).

checkout.success_subtitle: Thank you for your purchase. You will receive an email with your download links.
